NEW_DOLL_ROOM.title: Doll Room
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.INITIAL.description:
You enter a hidden room...

It's packed with an array of dolls. Each are unique, their expressions ranging from [green]joy[/green] to [purple]sorrow[/purple], their attire spanning centuries and realms beyond your own.

A [sine][blue]chorus of whispers[/blue][/sine] grows louder and louder until [jitter][red]the dolls are shouting[/red][/jitter] over each other and calling for you...

You must choose one and leave immediately.
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.INITIAL.options.EXAM: Examine Each and Make the Best Choice
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.INITIAL.options.EXTR: Open a hidden shelf of unfamiliar dolls.
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.TAKE_SOME_TIME.descr:
Amid the shouting, you quickly examine the dolls.

One of these two may be good?
It's hard to concentrate through the [red]mental anguish[/red].
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.EXAMINE.description:
You examine each and every doll before you make your choice.

The shouting has reached a [red][jitter]piercing crescendo[/jitter][/red] but you manage to make a choice before going completely mad!
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.EXAMINE.options.MOD_: Lose [red]2[/red] Max HP to browse more enticing dolls.
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.EXTRA.description:
You focus on three dolls that clearly do not belong to this room.

Their presence feels foreign, yet oddly compelling...
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.MORE.description: You pay the price in blood. In the dim light, two more dolls catch your eye...
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.VISTA_DOLL.descripti:
This [gold]familiar doll[/gold] doesn't exist.
But when you reach out to the air, it's in your hand.
[gold]"Don't lose my hat!"[/gold]
You seem to remember a story about a [gold]familiar person[/gold] and a trade.
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.WXW_DOLL.description:
A [purple][i][jitter]doll[/jitter][/i][/purple] from another dimension.
It feels familiar, yet strangely comforting.
[purple][i][jitter]Time, space, and dimension have brought us together again.[/jitter][/i][/purple]
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.BAIZEALER_DOLL.descr:
You feel countless starlike sparks pulsing from within the doll.
[blue][sine]"The stars will answer."[/sine][/blue]
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.GALLOP_DOLL.descript:
A doll that seems ready to run at any moment.
[gold]"Run with me."[/gold]
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.RHINE_DOLL.descripti:
You meet the doll's serene gaze; he waits for you to choose him of your own accord.
[aqua][sine]"If you're curious, I'd be glad to share what I know—they hail from the moon in the sky."[/sine][/aqua]
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.DOGKING_DOLL.descrip:
A dignified doll with a kingly air.
[gold]"Woof."[/gold]
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.PANSY_DOLL.descripti: A quiet doll with petal-like colors, like a pansy.
A fuzzy [blue]catball[/blue] plush with a faint [blue]plasma[/blue] glow swirling inside.
[aqua]"Nanain—purr."[/aqua]
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.I_ZERO_DOLL.descript:
You look toward that doll—and feel its gaze on you instead.
[red]"Meeting again? She's not here right now, but I can walk the rest of the way with you."[/red]
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.WILISHA_DOLL.descrip:
A doll in a dark crimson cloak, fingertips tapping as if counting.
[red]"Every ten attacks, I collect from someone—and the interest is paid in blood."[/red]
NEW_DOLL_ROOM.pages.CIFKA_DOLL.descripti:
The doll's hood hides nothing at all, yet a whisper still reaches you.
[purple]"Take me, and curses will leave on their own; on the highest floor, you will stand at trial once more."[/purple]
